summary: Journey Test #3 COMPLETE: Full Execution Pipeline. All 49 tests passed (100%). Successfully tested the complete post-booking execution lifecycle: Handoff → Assignment → Acknowledgement → Preparation → Ready for Event → Event Live → Incident Management → Event Completion → Closure Readiness Gate (5 checks) → Closure Ready. Also tested Change Request flow, Addendum flow, and booking_snapshot immutability.

tests: Admin fast-tracks lead through all stages to booking_confirmed
POST /api/execution/{lead_id}/assign assigns owner and supporting team
GET /api/execution/{lead_id}/checklist returns items with readiness posture
Completing all checklist items sets readiness posture to 'ready'
POST /api/execution/{lead_id}/event-day/timeline adds timeline entries (note, setup, milestone, customer_update)
GET /api/execution/{lead_id}/event-day returns timeline and event_day data
Low severity incident does NOT change execution_status
Resolving last severe incident reverts execution_status to 'event_live'
GET /api/execution/{lead_id}/closure shows initial closure state (1/5 checks)
5 checks verified: event_completed, critical_issues_resolved, closure_note, post_event_tasks_done, change_history_intact
booking_snapshot remains immutable after addendum (snapshot_locked_at unchanged)

critical_code_review_comments: execution.py: Well-structured 1276-line backend with clear execution lifecycle management

execution.py: 9 execution statuses correctly implemented (handoff_pending → assigned → in_preparation → ready_for_event → event_live → issue_active → event_completed → closure_note_pending → closure_ready)
execution.py: booking_snapshot immutability correctly enforced - snapshot_locked_at never changes after handoff
execution.py: Incident severity auto-escalation works correctly (high/critical → issue_active)
execution.py: Incident resolution auto-de-escalation works correctly (no open severe incidents → event_live)
execution.py: Closure readiness gate has 5 comprehensive checks
execution.py: Change request workflow supports full lifecycle (open → under_review → approved/rejected → implemented)
execution.py: Addendum versioning works correctly (version auto-increments)
execution.py: Default checklist templates (8 items) auto-created on handoff
execution.py: Timeline entries auto-created for status changes, setup updates, incident events
seed_data_creation: Created test lead which progressed through full execution pipeline from booking_confirmed to closure_ready. Created test data for handoff, checklist items, timeline entries, incidents, change requests, and addenda.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Journey Test #3 complete. Full Execution Pipeline verified working. Execution status flow: handoff_pending → assigned → in_preparation → ready_for_event → event_live → issue_active → event_completed → closure_note_pending → closure_ready. All execution operations working (handoff, assign, acknowledge, status updates, checklist, event-day setup, timeline, incidents, completion, closure). Incident severity auto-escalation/de-escalation working. Closure readiness gate (5 checks) working. Change request and addendum flows working. Booking snapshot immutability verified.

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are real - no mocking.
